name: Restaurant
description: A warm, moody fine-dining design system: deep espresso canvas, cream type, and a refined gold accent under a Playfair Display serif. A complete restaurant page from sticky navbar to footer.
whenToUse: Pick for hospitality and fine dining: restaurant sites, tasting-menu pages, chef's-table or supper-club microsites, wine bars, and intimate eatery launches. The chain is a complete restaurant narrative — sticky navbar with a reserve action, a full-bleed atmospheric hero, the menu as the centerpiece, a chef/story image-text, a dish-and-interior gallery, opening hours with address, a closing reservation CTA, and a footer. The look is dark and warm — espresso background, cream foreground, gold accent, serif display — so it reads candle-lit and considered. Avoid for bright SaaS marketing, dashboards, technical docs, or anything that needs a light, neutral, product-led feel.
